title: hesperis scapigera
intro: Hesperis scapigera, also known as European rocket or rocket, is a flowering plant in the mustard family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Hesperis scapigera can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, which is made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water.
